chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 76 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.01.2018 For orders on office objection For katcha peshi Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chang, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Asstt: A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if learned A.A.G. gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and shall provide legal protection to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. present in court files comments on behalf of official respondents and gives an undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner, shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioner as is provided to the other citizens of this country. In view of above undertaking of learned A.A.G., learned counsel for petitioners does not press the instant petition which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
